detaileddescription.para: Defines the prefix for Power Manager return codes.
Indicates the component is not connected.
Indicates the component does not currently support transitioning to requested state.
Indicates the component does not currently support transitioning to a different state.
Indicates the component does not support the requested power state.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Power Manager specific return codes.

detaileddescription.para: Invalid or no component.
Controller.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Represents the different components which can be accessed/controlled using the Power Manager.

detaileddescription.para: Controller component could not be connected due to Invalid SKU.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Power Manager error codes.

detaileddescription.para: Invalid or no power state.
Normal mode, this is the default or active state of the component.
Charging only mode. When charging component it cannot be used.
Standby mode.
Sleep mode.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Power states. Query MLPowerManagerGetAvailablePowerStates() to determine which power state is available for each component.

entry.para: Certain SKUs cannot use controller while charging
Controller is turned on but inactive, press home button to switch to active manually

detaileddescription.para: Not charging.
Charging normally.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Power Manager charging states.

detaileddescription.para: Component is connected.
Component is disconnected.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Connection state of the component.

detaileddescription.para: No issues reported.
Charge the component soon.
Charge the component immediately.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Battery info/warning codes.

detaileddescription.para: Extra info about battery, as represented by MLPowerManagerBatteryInfo.
Battery level. Range is between 0 and 100.
Charging state.
Connection state.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Power Manager property types. Query MLPowerManagerGetAvailableProperties() to determine which Power Manager properties are available for each component.
Power Manager specific return codes.
Represents the different components which can be accessed/controlled using the Power Manager.
Power Manager error codes.
Power states. Query MLPowerManagerGetAvailablePowerStates() to determine which power state is available for each component.

entry.para: Certain SKUs cannot use controller while charging
Controller is turned on but inactive, press home button to switch to active manually

briefdescription.para: Power Manager charging states.
Connection state of the component.
Battery info/warning codes.
Power Manager property types. Query MLPowerManagerGetAvailableProperties() to determine which Power Manager properties are available for each component.
A structure to encapsulate the data for each MLPowerManagerPropertyType.

detaileddescription.para: This struct and union is used as a flexible way for each component to output an array containing distinct types of data.

briefdescription.para: A structure to encapsulate output data when getting the current properties.
A structure to encapsulate output data when getting a component's available property types.
A structure to encapsulate information used by the Power Manager when getting the available property types.

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLPowerManagerPropertyTypeInfoInit before use.

briefdescription.para: A structure to encapsulate info data used by the Power Manager when getting the current properties.

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLPowerManagerPropertyInfoInit before use.

briefdescription.para: A structure to encapsulate settings used by the Power Manager when requesting the power state to be changed.

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLPowerManagerPowerStateSettingsInit before use.

briefdescription.para: A structure to encapsulate info data used by the Power Manager when getting the current power state.

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLPowerManagerPowerStateInfoInit before use.

briefdescription.para: A structure to encapsulate output data when either getting available power states, or the current power state.
A structure containing Power Manager callback events. Individual callbacks which are not required by the Power Manager can be NULL.
Initializes the default values for MLPowerManagerPropertyTypeInfo.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default values.

briefdescription.para: Initializes the default values for MLPowerManagerPropertyInfo.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default values.

briefdescription.para: Initializes the default values for MLPowerManagerPowerStateSettings.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default values.

briefdescription.para: Initializes the default values for MLPowerManagerPowerStateInfo.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default values.

briefdescription.para: Initializes the default values for MLPowerManagerCallbacks.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default values.

briefdescription.para: Creates a Power Manager handle for a specified component.

detaileddescription.para: In a single application multiple calls to this API method, for the same component type will return a new handle each time. The handle is valid until MLPowerManagerDestroy for that specific handle is called.

parameterdescription.para: The component specific to the handle to be created.
The handle to be created.
Failed due to an invalid parameter.
Handle for this component already exists.
Power Manager handle was successfully created.
Power Manager handle failed to be created.

briefdescription.para: Destroys a Power Manager handle.

parameterdescription.para: The Power Manager handle for a specific component to be destroyed.
Passed handle was invalid.
Power Manager handle was successfully destroyed.

briefdescription.para: Register Power Manager callbacks for a specific handle.

detaileddescription.para: The MLPowerManagerCallbacks structure can be set for each handle, whether those handles are for the same or different component types.

parameterdescription.para: Power Manager handle for component to set MLPowerManagerCallbacks for.
Callbacks to receive Power Manager events. Set this to NULL to unregister callbacks.
The caller can pass in user context data that will be returned in the callback (can be NULL).
Failed due to an invalid parameter.
The callbacks have been registered.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.

briefdescription.para: Sets the power state of a component. The new power state of a component will persist if the application loses focus, or exits.

parameterdescription.para: Power Manager handle for component to set power state for.
Settings used by the Power Manager updating a component's power state.
The component does not support the requested power state.
Failed due to an invalid parameter.
The component does not support transitioning to the requested state.
The component is not connected.
The power state of the controller was set successfully.
The component currently does not support transitioning to a different state.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.
The component does not support the requested power state.

briefdescription.para: Gets the power manager properties of a component.

parameterdescription.para: Power Manager handle for component to get properties of.
MLPowerManagerPropertyInfo struct filled with information about the power manager properties of a component to request.
Information about the properties of a component. Must be released using MLPowerManagerReleasePropertyData after each successful call.
Failed due to memory allocation failure.
Failed due to an invalid parameter.
The property of the controller was retrieved successfully.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.

briefdescription.para: Releases specified MLPowerManagerPropertyData.

detaileddescription.para: This function should be called exactly once for each successful call to MLPowerManagerGetComponentProperties.

parameterdescription.para: Power Manager handle for component relating to MLPowerManagerPropertyData.
Pointer to a MLPowerManagerPropertyData returned from MLPowerManagerGetComponentProperties.
Successfully released MLPowerManagerPropertyData.
properties parameter was not valid (NULL).
Failed due to internal error.

briefdescription.para: Query available power states for a component.

parameterdescription.para: Power Manager handle for component to get list of all available power states for.
MLPowerManagerPowerStateInfo struct filled with data to be used by the Power Manager when requesting/receiving all available power states.
MLPowerManagerPowerStateData holding list of available power states. Must be released using MLPowerManagerReleasePowerStateData after each successful call.
Failed due to memory allocation failure.
Failed due to an invalid parameter.
Query completed and out_states has been populated.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.

briefdescription.para: Gets the power state of a component.

parameterdescription.para: Power Manager handle for component to get power state from.
MLPowerManagerPowerStateInfo struct filled with data to be used by the Power Manager when requesting/receiving power state.
MLPowerManagerPowerStateData with the current power state. Must be released using MLPowerManagerReleasePowerStateData after each successful call.
The component is not connected.
Failed due to an invalid parameter.
The power state of the controller was retrieved successfully.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.

briefdescription.para: Releases specified MLPowerManagerPowerStateData.

detaileddescription.para: This function should be called exactly once for each successful call to MLPowerManagerGetAvailablePowerStates.

parameterdescription.para: Power Manager handle for component relating to MLPowerManagerPowerStateData.
Pointer to a MLPowerManagerPowerStateData.
Successfully released MLPowerManagerPowerStateData.
power_states parameter was not valid (NULL).
Failed due to internal error.

briefdescription.para: Request a list of the available MLPowerManagerPropertyType.

parameterdescription.para: Power Manager handle for component to get properties from.
MLPowerManagerPropertyTypeInfo struct filled with data to be used by the Power Manager when requesting/receiving available property types.
Information about the properties of a component. Must be released using MLPowerManagerReleasePropertyTypeData after each successful call.
Failed due to memory allocation failure.
Failed due to an invalid parameter.
Query completed and out_properties has been populated.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.

briefdescription.para: Releases specified MLPowerManagerPropertyTypeData.

detaileddescription.para: This function should be called exactly once for each successful call to MLPowerManagerGetAvailableProperties.

parameterdescription.para: Power Manager handle for component relating to MLPowerManagerPropertyTypeData.
Pointer to a MLPowerManagerPropertyTypeData.
Successfully MLPowerManagerPropertyTypeData.
properties parameter was not valid (NULL).
Failed due to internal error.

briefdescription.para: Returns an ASCII string for each result code.

parameterdescription.para: MLResult to select the result code.
string containing readable version of result code.
